_description: Static — workflow graph for AgentZero Lite. Each Core workflow has TWO diagrams: `mermaid` (high-level data/control flow) and `sourceMermaid` (the C#/XAML files & classes that implement it). The `file` field is informational only — `Docs/harness/` was removed (commit aefe4c2) so there is no canonical .md to open from the viewer; the source-files panel is the live reference instead. Skill-system workflows are intentionally excluded (per project rule).

workflows.label: Multi-CLI Workflow
workflows.description: Multiple ConPTY tabs hosting different AI CLIs side by side; messages routed between them via WM_COPYDATA + bot-chat
workflows.mermaid:
graph LR
  U[User] --> S[StageActor]
  S --> W[WorkspaceActor]
  W --> T1[Terminal: Claude]
  W --> T2[Terminal: Codex]
  T1 -. bot-chat --from .-> S
  T2 -. bot-chat --from .-> S
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB
  subgraph WPF[Project/AgentZeroWpf]
    MW[MainWindow.xaml.cs]
    CPT[Services/ConPtyTerminalSession.cs]
  end
  subgraph Actors[Project/ZeroCommon/Actors]
    SA[StageActor.cs]
    WA[WorkspaceActor.cs]
    TA[TerminalActor.cs]
    AB[AgentBotActor.cs]
  end
  subgraph Seam[Project/ZeroCommon/Services]
    ITS[ITerminalSession.cs]
  end
  MW --> SA
  SA --> WA
  WA --> TA
  TA --> ITS
  CPT -.implements.-> ITS
  AB -.routes user input.-> SA

workflows.label: AIMODE — Identity-first Handshake
workflows.description: Local AgentBot first-contacts a peer terminal, the peer acks via -cli bot-chat with --from <peerName>, then substantive exchange begins
workflows.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User
  participant B as AgentBot (local)
  participant R as AgentReactorActor
  participant P as Peer terminal
  U->>B: "Talk to the Claude tab"
  B->>R: StartReactor (Mode 2)
  R->>P: send_to_terminal(handshake)
  P->>B: bot-chat "DONE(handshake-ok)" --from Claude
  R->>P: substantive turn
  P->>B: real reply
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart LR subgraph Bot[Project/ZeroCommon/Actors] AB[AgentBotActor.cs
_introducedTerminals HashSet] AR[AgentReactorActor.cs
StartReactor / Mode 2] MSG[Messages.cs
IntroduceTerminalIfFirst] end subgraph CLI[Project/AgentZeroWpf] CH[CliHandler.cs
bot-chat --from] end AB --> AR AR --> MSG CH -.WM_COPYDATA.-> AB

workflows.label: Tool-call Loop (dual backend)
workflows.description: Gemma path enforces structure via GBNF sampler; Nemotron path uses native Llama-3.1 chat template. Both share IAgentToolHost
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart TD U[User prompt] --> L[AgentToolLoop] L -->|Gemma path| GBNF[GBNF sampler
5-tool catalog] L -->|Nemotron path| TPL[Llama-3.1 chat template
native tool channel] GBNF --> P[Parse JSON] TPL --> P P --> H[IAgentToolHost
WorkspaceTerminalToolHost] H -->|tool result| L L -->|loop until done| L
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Tools[Project/ZeroCommon/Llm/Tools] ATL[AgentToolLoop.cs] CT[ChatTemplates.cs
Gemma + Llama31] ATG[AgentToolGrammar.cs
GBNF sampler] IATH[IAgentToolHost.cs] end subgraph WPF[Project/AgentZeroWpf] WTH[Services/WorkspaceTerminalToolHost.cs] end ATL --> CT ATL --> ATG ATL --> IATH WTH -.implements.-> IATH

workflows.label: LLM Provider Switch
workflows.description: One Local/External radio in the LLM tab; factory returns the right ILlmProvider at runtime. Four hosted/local providers behind a single OpenAiCompatibleProvider
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart TD S["LLM tab — Local · External"] --> F[LlmProviderFactory] F -->|Local| LH["LLamaSharp host
Gemma 4 / Nemotron"] F -->|External| OAC[OpenAiCompatibleProvider] OAC --> W[Webnori] OAC --> O[OpenAI] OAC --> LMS[LM Studio] OAC --> OLL[Ollama]
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB
  subgraph Llm[Project/ZeroCommon/Llm]
    GW[LlmGateway.cs]
    LLB[LocalLlmBackend.cs]
  end
  subgraph Providers[Project/ZeroCommon/Llm/Providers]
    F[LlmProviderFactory.cs]
    I[ILlmProvider.cs]
    OAC[OpenAiCompatibleProvider.cs]
  end
  GW --> F
  F --> I
  OAC -.implements.-> I
  LLB -.implements.-> I

workflows.label: Voice Pipeline (STT → LLM → TTS)
workflows.description: NAudio mic → dual-VAD → ISpeechToText → LlmGateway.OpenSession → ITextToSpeech → NAudio playback. Mute-while-playing prevents the loop talking to itself
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR M[Mic
NAudio
16 kHz mono] --> V[VAD
frame + utterance] V -->|UtteranceEnded| STT[ISpeechToText] STT -->|text| GW[LlmGateway.OpenSession] GW -->|reply| CL[TtsTextCleaner] CL --> TTS[ITextToSpeech] TTS -->|audio bytes| PB[VoicePlaybackService] PB -->|while playing| MUTE[Muted=true] MUTE -.-> M
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Capture[Project/AgentZeroWpf/Services/Voice] VCS[VoiceCaptureService.cs
NAudio mic] VPS[VoicePlaybackService.cs] NPQ[NAudioPlaybackQueue.cs] end subgraph Streams[Project/ZeroCommon/Voice/Streams] VC[VadConfig.cs] VSF[VoiceSegmenterFlow.cs] SWA[SttWorkerActor.cs] TWA[TtsWorkerActor.cs] end subgraph Voice[Project/ZeroCommon/Voice] ISTT[ISpeechToText.cs] ITTS[ITextToSpeech.cs] CLEAN[TtsTextCleaner.cs] WL[WhisperLocalStt.cs] OAS[OpenAiWhisperStt.cs] WIN[WindowsTts.cs] end subgraph Actors[Project/ZeroCommon/Actors] VSA[VoiceStreamActor.cs] end VCS --> VSF VSF --> VC VSF --> SWA SWA --> ISTT ISTT --> CLEAN CLEAN --> TWA TWA --> ITTS ITTS --> VPS VPS --> NPQ WL -.impl.-> ISTT OAS -.impl.-> ISTT WIN -.impl.-> ITTS VSA -.coordinates.-> SWA VSA -.coordinates.-> TWA

workflows.label: CLI ↔ GUI IPC
workflows.description: Single AgentZeroLite.exe in two modes: -cli sends WM_COPYDATA to the running GUI, GUI writes JSON to a named memory-mapped file with prefix AgentZeroLite_*, CLI polls and exits. Default 5s timeout; --no-wait skips the wait entirely.
workflows.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  participant CLI as AgentZeroLite.exe -cli <cmd>
  participant WIN as Win32 (WM_COPYDATA)
  participant GUI as Running GUI (single instance)
  participant MMF as Memory-mapped file
  CLI->>WIN: marker 0x414C "AL" + cmd JSON
  WIN->>GUI: WndProc receive
  GUI->>GUI: dispatch (terminal / status / bot-chat)
  GUI->>MMF: write response JSON
  CLI->>MMF: poll AgentZeroLite_<id>
  MMF-->>CLI: response
  CLI-->>CLI: print + exit
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph CLI[Project/AgentZeroWpf] CH[CliHandler.cs
send WM_COPYDATA + poll MMF] CIH[Module/CliTerminalIpcHelper.cs
JSON build + MMF write] APP[App.xaml.cs
OnStartup branch on -cli] end subgraph GUI[Project/AgentZeroWpf/UI/APP] MW[MainWindow.xaml.cs
WndProc receive] end subgraph Wrap[Project/AgentZeroWpf] PS[AgentZeroLite.ps1
-NoNewWindow -Wait] end APP --> CH CH -.WM_COPYDATA.-> MW MW --> CIH CIH -.MMF.-> CH PS -.wraps.-> APP

workflows.label: WebDev Plugin System
workflows.description: M0006 — Browser plugins for the WebDev sample panel. Manifest-driven discovery from %LOCALAPPDATA%/AgentZeroLite/Wasm/plugins/, install via .zip / Git URL / official catalog (GitHub Trees API), per-sample WebView2 cache so switching is instant and JS state survives.
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR U[User] --> WP[WebDevPagePanel] WP -->|select| SC[WebDevSampleCatalog] SC -->|built-in| BR[Wasm/] SC -->|installed| PR[%LOCALAPPDATA%/AgentZeroLite/Wasm/plugins/] WP -->|+ Install| INS[InstallPluginPickerDialog] INS -->|.zip| WPI[WebDevPluginInstaller] INS -->|Git URL| WPI INS -->|Official| OPC[OfficialPluginCatalog] WPI --> PM[PluginManifest validate] PM --> WV[WebView2 mount] WV --> BG[WebDevBridge
JS↔C# RPC]
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Browser[Project/AgentZeroWpf/Services/Browser] PM[PluginManifest.cs
id/name/entry validate] WSC[WebDevSampleCatalog.cs
discovery] WPI[WebDevPluginInstaller.cs
zip-slip safe] OPC[OfficialPluginCatalog.cs
GitHub Trees API] WH[WebDevHost.cs
shared LLM/voice] WB[WebDevBridge.cs
JS↔.NET] end subgraph UI[Project/AgentZeroWpf/UI/Components] WPP[WebDevPagePanel.xaml.cs
per-sample ViewSlot cache] WTP[WebDevTutorialPanel.xaml.cs] IPD[InstallPluginPickerDialog.xaml.cs] end WPP --> WSC WSC --> PM WPP --> IPD IPD --> WPI IPD --> OPC WPI --> PM WPP --> WH WPP --> WB

workflows.label: WebDev Floating Window
workflows.description: M0010 — Detach a plugin's WebView2 into a separate window. Reparenting only (no reload, no JS state loss); WindowChrome with custom 24-px titlebar; per-sample persistence (pin / opacity / chrome / x,y,w,h); Pin = Owner detach so main-window minimize doesn't pull it down.
workflows.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> Docked Docked --> Reparent: Detach button Reparent --> Floating: Show() Floating --> Reparent: ✕ / Dock back / chromeHandle drag Reparent --> Docked: re-add to viewHost Floating --> Floating: Pin → Owner=null
Opacity slider
Title bar toggle Docked --> [*]: main window close
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph UI[Project/AgentZeroWpf/UI/Components] WPP[WebDevPagePanel.xaml.cs
_floatingBySampleId dict] FWW[FloatingWebDevWindow.xaml.cs
WindowChrome + chromeHandle] end subgraph Browser[Project/AgentZeroWpf/Services/Browser] WFP[WebDevFloatingPrefs.cs
per-sample JSON] end WPP -.reparent WebView2.-> FWW FWW --> WFP WPP --> WFP

workflows.label: Token Usage Telemetry
workflows.description: Cross-vendor LLM token observability. Tails Anthropic + Codex JSONL transcripts disk-side via incremental byte-offset checkpoints, dedups by message id, aggregates by vendor/account/model. Account aliasing for redacted ~/.claude/* directory swaps.
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR CC[Claude Code
~/.claude/*.jsonl] --> COL[Token collector
incremental tail] CX[Codex CLI
~/.codex/*.jsonl] --> COL COL -->|per-row| TUR[TokenUsageRecord] TUR -->|aggregate| Q[TokenUsageQueryService] Q --> DASH[Dashboard panel] COL -.checkpoint.-> TSC[TokenSourceCheckpoint
ByteOffset + LineCount] COL -.account map.-> TAA[TokenAccountAlias]
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Telemetry[Project/ZeroCommon/Telemetry] TUC[TokenUsageCollector.cs] TUQ[TokenUsageQueryService.cs] end subgraph Entities[Project/ZeroCommon/Data/Entities] TUR[TokenUsageRecord.cs
vendor/account/model/in/out/cache] TSC[TokenSourceCheckpoint.cs
per-file ByteOffset/LineCount] TAA[TokenAccountAlias.cs
profile dir → AccountKey] end TUC --> TUR TUC --> TSC TUC --> TAA TUQ --> TUR

workflows.label: Release Pipeline
workflows.description: version.txt bump → annotated git tag → GitHub Actions builds win-x64 self-contained ZIP + Inno Setup installer → publishes to GitHub Releases
workflows.mermaid:
graph LR
  V[version.txt bump] --> T[annotated git tag]
  T --> P[git push --tags]
  P --> GA[GitHub Actions]
  GA --> Z[win-x64 ZIP]
  GA --> I[Inno Setup installer]
  Z --> R[GitHub Releases]
  I --> R
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Repo[Project/AgentZeroWpf] VT[version.txt] CSP[AgentZeroWpf.csproj
BumpVersionAfterBuild target] end subgraph CI[.github/workflows] REL[release.yml
tags v*] PAG[pages.yml
tags doc-v*] end subgraph Pack[installer/] ISS[setup.iss
Inno Setup] end CSP -.bumps.-> VT VT --> REL REL --> ISS

workflows.label: Tech Doc Publishing (Notion → X)
workflows.description: Vault-first English drafting in a separate Obsidian repo, then Notion AI-DOC publish, then X announcement (canonical pattern: title + URL + 🔗 backlinks + quote card)
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR D[Vault draft
D:\MYNOTE\Tech\AgentZeroLite] --> A[Approval] A --> N[Notion AI-DOC] N --> V[Verify publish] V --> X[X post — canonical] X --> AN[Annotate vault]
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB
  subgraph Skill[.claude/skills/psmon-doc-writer]
    SK[SKILL.md]
  end
  subgraph Vault[D:/MYNOTE/Tech/AgentZeroLite]
    DR[drafts/*.md]
    ST[Study/*.md]
  end
  subgraph External[External MCPs]
    NO[Notion MCP]
    XR[X via Atlassian/manual]
  end
  SK --> DR
  DR --> NO
  NO --> XR
  XR -.annotate.-> ST
